metadata.description: 60+ fullstack development skills for AI coding agents

plugins.name: maiyu-sh-backend
plugins.description: 25 backend development skills — controllers, services, repositories, models, auth, middleware, migrations, testing and more. Supports Fastify, Express, NestJS, AdonisJS, Hono, Elysia

plugins.name: maiyu-sh-frontend
plugins.description: 31 frontend development skills — forms, components, data tables, CRUD pages, kanban, rich editor, permissions, stores and more. Supports Next.js, React, Vue, TanStack, shadcn/Radix

plugins.name: maiyu-sh-devops
plugins.description: 3 DevOps skills — Dockerfile, Docker Compose, and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows for Node.js projects
